'''鈭歫-t-n''' ('''jatana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:esterize|esterize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:esterize|esterize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-t-n
|-
! Lemma
| jatana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatanithi|jatanithi]] || [[word:jataniji|jataniji]] || [[word:jatanishi|jatanishi]] || [[word:jatani|jatani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatanuthuth|jatanuthuth]] || [[word:jatanujuj|jatanujuj]] || [[word:jatanushush|jatanushush]] || [[word:jatan|jatan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatanuthu|jatanuthu]] || [[word:jatanuju|jatanuju]] || [[word:jatanushu|jatanushu]] || [[word:jatanu|jatanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatanufuth|jatanufuth]] || [[word:jatanufuj|jatanufuj]] || [[word:jatanufush|jatanufush]] || [[word:jatanuf|jatanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatanethe|jatanethe]] || [[word:jataneje|jataneje]] || [[word:jataneshe|jataneshe]] || [[word:jatane|jatane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatanothoth|jatanothoth]] || [[word:jatanojoj|jatanojoj]] || [[word:jatanoshosh|jatanoshosh]] || [[word:jatan|jatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatanotho|jatanotho]] || [[word:jatanojo|jatanojo]] || [[word:jatanosho|jatanosho]] || [[word:jatano|jatano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatanofoth|jatanofoth]] || [[word:jatanofoj|jatanofoj]] || [[word:jatanofosh|jatanofosh]] || [[word:jatanof|jatanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatan忙th忙|jatan忙th忙]] || [[word:jatan忙j忙|jatan忙j忙]] || [[word:jatan忙sh忙|jatan忙sh忙]] || [[word:jatan忙|jatan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatanathath|jatanathath]] || [[word:jatanajaj|jatanajaj]] || [[word:jatanashash|jatanashash]] || [[word:jatan|jatan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatanatha|jatanatha]] || [[word:jatanaja|jatanaja]] || [[word:jatanasha|jatanasha]] || [[word:jatana|jatana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatanafath|jatanafath]] || [[word:jatanafaj|jatanafaj]] || [[word:jatanafash|jatanafash]] || [[word:jatanaf|jatanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jatanasha|jatanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojatanasha|gojatanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijatanasha|gokijatanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jatan眉sha|jatan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojatankn眉sha|gojatankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijatan眉sha|gokijatan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jatansh毛sha|jatansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojatanksh毛sha|gojatanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijatansh毛sha|gokijatansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatanrosha|jatanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatankrosha|gojatankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatanrosha|gokijatanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jatanmusha|jatanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatankmusha|gojatankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatanmusha|gokijatanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jatansherasha|jatansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojatanksherasha|gojatanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijatansherasha|gokijatansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jatangasha|jatangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojatankngasha|gojatankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijatangasha|gokijatangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jatanyasha|jatanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojatankyasha|gojatankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijatanyasha|gokijatanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jatanyamasha|jatanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojatankyamasha|gojatankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijatanyamasha|gokijatanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatan眉sh毛sha|jatan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatankn眉sh毛sha|gojatankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatan眉sh毛sha|gokijatan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatan眉rosha|jatan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatankn眉rosha|gojatankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatan眉rosha|gokijatan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatan眉musha|jatan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatankn眉musha|gojatankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatan眉musha|gokijatan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatansh毛n眉sha|jatansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatanksh毛n眉sha|gojatanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatansh毛n眉sha|gokijatansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatansh毛rosha|jatansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatanksh毛rosha|gojatanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatansh毛rosha|gokijatansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatansh毛musha|jatansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatanksh毛musha|gojatanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatansh毛musha|gokijatansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatanron眉sha|jatanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatankron眉sha|gojatankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatanron眉sha|gokijatanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatanrosh毛sha|jatanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatankrosh毛sha|gojatankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatanrosh毛sha|gokijatanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatanromusha|jatanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatankromusha|gojatankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatanromusha|gokijatanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatanmun眉sha|jatanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatankmun眉sha|gojatankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatanmun眉sha|gokijatanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatanmush毛sha|jatanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatankmush毛sha|gojatankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatanmush毛sha|gokijatanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatanmurosha|jatanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatankmurosha|gojatankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatanmurosha|gokijatanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jatan|jatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:j忙t忙n|j忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojatan|hojatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoj忙t忙n|hoj忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojatan|hohojatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoj忙t忙n|hohoj忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉jatan|n眉jatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉j忙t忙n|n眉j忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉jatan|n眉n眉jatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉j忙t忙n|n眉n眉j忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂jatan|n茂jatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂j忙t忙n|n茂j忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂jatan|n茂n茂jatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂j忙t忙n|n茂n茂j忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujatan|lujatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luj忙t忙n|luj忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujatan|lulujatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluj忙t忙n|luluj忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijatan|lijatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lij忙t忙n|lij忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijatan|lilijatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilij忙t忙n|lilij忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojatan|kojatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koj忙t忙n|koj忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojatan|kokojatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoj忙t忙n|kokoj忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejatan|kejatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kej忙t忙n|kej忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejatan|kekejatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekej忙t忙n|kekej忙t忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
